no: Quest/content mod that smooths transitions between campaigns. Should be installed with quest mods, NOT tactical mods. Install before Endless BG1 and BG1RE if using them.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: Managed conflict. Transitions cn:140 and Themed Tweaks cn:200 are functionally identical (same script code for CUT59B.BCS). TT cn:200 has REQUIRE_PREDICATE that auto-skips if Transitions cn:140 is installed. Transitions cn:140 is ABSENT, TT cn:200 is present — no conflict. Transitions cn:10 (BG1 dream) is present and coexists safely with TT cn:200 (different files: PLAYER1D vs CUT59B). If cn:10 installed, TT cn:200 also grants the #LPWR powers.
conflicts.myComps: #10 Use BGI ending movie as dream #140 Use Irenicus in hell movie to restore powers
conflicts.theirComps: #200 Use Irenicus in hell movie as dream
conflicts.source: TT tp2 line 183: REQUIRE_PREDICATE !(MOD_IS_INSTALLED transitions.tp2 #L-TRANSITIONS-RESTORE_POWER); identical scripts in CUT59B, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Complementary, different files. Transitions replaces StartMovie('ENDMOVIE') in AR0125 script with post-Sarevok continuation. MiH cn:21 removes LeaveAreaLUA/AdvanceTime from DELTAN dialogue. No shared files. Install Transitions before MiH cn:21 — MiH's change becomes redundant but harmless. No multicat needed since they don't modify the same resources.
conflicts.theirComps: #21 Prevent Ch6 Cutscene from Moving Party
conflicts.source: Transitions main_bg1.tpa patches AR0125; MiH setup_no_ch6_teleport.tpa patches DELTAN dialog; no shared files, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Transitions tp2 explicitly uninstalls EndlessBG1 cn:14 (Korlasz' Dungeon is in BG1) because it supersedes that functionality. Remove cn:14 from selection when using Transitions.

sum: Adds 15 transition scenes between campaigns in EET, smoothing the story flow as you move from BG1 to SoD to BG2 to ToB.

co.n: Main component: Allow continued play after Sarevok and/or Irenicus is defeated
co.tp2n: Main component: Allow continued play after Sarevok and/or Irenicus is defeated

co.n: Use BGI ending movie as a dream and give new bhaal-spawn power at first rest
co.no: Uses BG1 ending movie as a dream sequence and grants a new Bhaalspawn power at first rest. Requires main component.
co.tp2n: Use BGI ending movie as a dream and give new bhaal-spawn power at first rest

co.n: Give Sarevok his armor, helm, and sword -> Equipped
co.scn: Give Sarevok his armor, helm, and sword
co.no: Sarevok's equipment is equipped on him when he joins. Choose one option.
co.tp2n: Equipped

co.n: In inventory only
co.tp2n: In inventory only
co.scn: Give Sarevok his armor, helm, and sword

co.n: Use EndlessBG1's handling of Sarevok's equipment, if available, else use Option 2
co.tp2n: Use EndlessBG1's handling of Sarevok's equipment, if available, else use Option 2
co.scn: Give Sarevok his armor, helm, and sword

co.n: Clean-up Quests -> Those supporters that are still alive when Sarevok dies immediately flee the area (to give more clean-up quests)
co.no: Supporters that are still alive when Sarevok dies immediately flee, harsh resolution. Choose one option.
co.tp2n: Those supporters that are still alive when Sarevok dies immediately flee the area (to give more clean-up quests)

co.n: Behavior of the Sarevok's supporters in the final BGI battle is unchanged
co.tp2n: Behavior of the Sarevok's supporters in the final BGI battle is unchanged

co.n: Option 1 and use gentler Tamoko quest
co.tp2n: Option 1 and use gentler Tamoko quest

co.n: Option 2 and use gentler Tamoko quest
co.tp2n: Option 2 and use gentler Tamoko quest

co.n: Close quests and rumors that can't be finished after Sarevok is defeated
co.no: Closes open quests and rumors that can't be finished after Sarevok is defeated. Prevents journal clutter.
co.tp2n: Close quests and rumors that can't be finished after Sarevok is defeated

co.n: Clean up the town folk chatter with regard to Sarevok
co.no: Cleans up town folk chatter that references Sarevok as if he's still a threat.
co.tp2n: Clean up the town folk chatter with regard to Sarevok

co.n: Clean up the wounded from the thieves' maze
co.no: Removes wounded NPCs from the thieves' maze after the plot is resolved.
co.tp2n: Clean up the wounded from the thieves' maze

co.n: Elminster makes an appearance outside of the Ducal Palace
co.no: Elminster appears outside the Ducal Palace after Sarevok is defeated.
co.tp2n: Elminster makes an appearance outside of the Ducal Palace

co.n: Eltan Reward: House near Ducal Palace
co.no: Eltan rewards hero with a house near the Ducal Palace.
co.tp2n: Duke Eltan's reward option: House near Ducal Palace

co.n: Duke Eltan's reward option: Cabin in High Hedge
co.tp2n: Duke Eltan's reward option: Cabin in High Hedge

co.n: Duke Eltan's reward option: Gray house in NW Beregost
co.tp2n: Duke Eltan's reward option: Gray house in NW Beregost

co.n: Duke Eltan's reward option: House across from Flaming Fist compound
co.tp2n: Duke Eltan's reward option: House across from Flaming Fist compound

co.n: Add Waves of Refugees to Baldur's Gate
co.no: Adds waves of refugees flowing into Baldur's Gate after the crisis.
co.tp2n: Add Waves of Refugees to Baldur's Gate

co.n: Use abbreviated capture scene leading to BG2
co.no: Uses an abbreviated capture scene when transitioning to BG2. Requires SoD.
co.tp2n: Use abbreviated capture scene leading to BG2

co.n: Use Irenicus in hell movie to restore Bhaal-spawn powers after he is defeated
co.no: Uses the Irenicus in hell movie to restore Bhaalspawn powers after defeating him. BG2EE/EET only.
co.tp2n: Use Irenicus in hell movie to restore Bhaal-spawn powers after he is defeated

co.n: Give Sarevok his armor, helm, and sword -> In Inventory
co.no: Sarevok's equipment placed in inventory instead of equipped. Choose one option.

co.n: Give Sarevok his armor, helm, and sword -> Use EndlessBG1 handling
co.no: HARD FAIL: PARSE ERROR in sarevok1.tpa line 10 — uses 'IF' instead of 'ACTION_IF' inside a DEFINE_ACTION_FUNCTION body. WeiDU cannot parse this. Bug in Transitions mod. Choose cn:20 or cn:21 instead.

co.n: Clean-up Quests: Supporters don't flee (harsh)
co.no: Supporters stay when Sarevok dies, harsh resolution. Choose one option.

co.n: Clean-up Quests: Supporters flee (gentle)
co.no: Supporters flee when Sarevok dies, gentle resolution. Choose one option.

co.n: Clean-up Quests: Supporters don't flee (gentle)
co.no: Supporters stay, gentle resolution. Choose one option.

co.n: Eltan Reward: Cabin in High Hedge
Eltan Reward: Gray house in NW Beregost
Eltan Reward: House near Flaming Fist compound
co.no: Eltan rewards hero with a house near the Flaming Fist compound.

advisories.reason: Both modify Bhaalspawn power acquisition. May interact unexpectedly
advisories.myComps: #10 BGI dream with new Bhaalspawn power #140 Irenicus movie restores Bhaalspawn powers
advisories.theirComps: #202 #241 Revised Bhaalpowers #218 Regain Bhaalpowers in ToB
